user.title: Configure Electricity Price
user.description: Enter your ENTSO-E API key and select your price area. You can register for a free API key at transparency.entsoe.eu.

reconfigure.title: Update API Key
reconfigure.description: Enter a new ENTSO-E API key.

error.auth_failed: Invalid API key. Please check your ENTSO-E security token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to ENTSO-E API. Check your network connection.
error.no_data: No price data available for this area. The key and area may still be valid.

abort.already_configured: This price area is already configured.

tiers.title: Configure Price Tiers
tiers.description: Set a name, color, and upper limit for each tier. The last tier is the catch-all and has no upper limit.

error.invalid_thresholds: Invalid tier configuration. Make sure all names are filled in and upper limits are in increasing order.

set_transfer_fee.name: Set transfer fee
set_transfer_fee.description: Update the transfer fee addition applied to electricity prices.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The electricity price device to update.

transfer_fee.name: Transfer fee
transfer_fee.description: The transfer fee to add to each price slot (c/kWh). Enter the VAT-inclusive value.

set_vat.name: Set VAT
set_vat.description: Update the VAT percentage applied to electricity prices.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The electricity price device to update.
